title: Luscious Uruguayan Pineapple Skewers
description: A midnight craving grilled pineapple skewer with brine-dry salt, umami soy-worcestershire glaze, and a touch of smoky paprika.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a bowl, whisk together soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, smoked paprika, lime juice, olive oil, black pepper, garlic powder, and crushed red pepper flakes.
Pat pineapple cubes dry with paper towels, then sprinkle with sea salt and toss to coat.
Thread pineapple cubes onto skewers, spacing them evenly.
Brush each skewer generously with the glaze mixture, reserving some for later use.
Place skewers on the grill and cook 3 to 4 minutes per side, basting with remaining glaze as they turn.
Remove from grill when pineapple is caramelized and slightly charred, about 12 minutes total.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with chopped cilantro.
